name: Priority Care Wheelchair
districts_or_customers: Individual medical/veterans riders in Dallas-Fort Worth/Farmers Branch area
recent_news: No notable M&A or growth news identified. Operates as Priority Care Transit (DBA Priority Care Wheelchair Trnst) per BBB.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. Micro NEMT/wheelchair/veterans transport provider with ~3 employees. Out of scope as Summit student-transportation tuck-in.

name: M D Transportation & Charter
districts_or_customers: Las Vegas area schools/charter schools (CCSD market)
recent_news: No M&A news. Small independent Las Vegas operator (USDOT 1695782) listed under buses/school transportation services category.
fit_notes: Small (~20 employees) independent Las Vegas school/charter bus operator owned by Gina Easley. Possible niche tuck-in for Nevada expansion, but scale is sub-scale; would need fleet/contract diligence.

name: Hottenstein Bus & Charter
districts_or_customers: Likely Platteville School District and surrounding southwest Wisconsin districts (Livingston/Platteville area)
recent_news: No M&A news identified. Long-tenured family-owned operator with locations in Livingston and Platteville, WI.
fit_notes: Independent family-owned WI school/charter bus operator (~11 employees, two locations). Eponymous owner suggests potential succession opportunity; small scale but classic regional tuck-in profile for Summit's Midwest footprint.

name: Smiley Transportation
recent_news: July 2025: Lori and Tom Woody acquired Smiley Transportation from founder; Lori had been Office Manager since 2021. Operates door-to-door student shuttle via passenger vans, not full-size school buses.
fit_notes: Just changed hands in July 2025 to new owners (succession low for next 2-3 years). Van-based parent-paid student shuttle model, not yellow-bus district contractor. Limited fit as traditional Summit tuck-in; possible adjacency play for North Texas SPED/shuttle.

name: School Bus Live LLC
service_types: unverified - potentially school bus brokerage/sales or small charter
recent_news: No web presence or news identified. Website schoolbuslive.com returned self-signed certificate error (likely defunct or non-public). Registered Miami address is a PMB (private mailbox) suggesting micro/virtual operation.
fit_notes: Cannot confirm as operating school-bus contractor. PMB address, 3 employees, no district contracts identified, broken/inactive website. Out of scope as Summit tuck-in target.
